steps.title: Find the causal relationship
steps.content: Loris Taylor wanted to ensure Native radio stations like KBFT thrived — her stated goal. The next sentence describes an action she took. The strongest signal is that founding Native Public Media directly resulted from her goal; it was her response to achieve it.

steps.title: Match the consequence transition
steps.content: "Hence" means "therefore" or "as a result," the word that connects a statement to its logical consequence. The other three signal entirely different relationships — opposition, correction, or restatement — none of which fit the causal flow in the passage. That matches choice A — A is correct.
